Blog

BEiNG-WISE Training School

September 01, 2025

I recently attended the third training school of BEiNG-WISE, “Cybersecurity and Human Factors from an Industrial and Ethical Perspective.” The event was fantastic, bringing together diverse disciplines under one roof. The key takeaway was clear: cybersecurity is not just technical, it is deeply human. The program included insightful discussions on psychology, ethics, and law.

Cortex-M Architecture

August 09, 2023

The ArmCortex-M3 microcontroller architecture follows the Harvard architecture design, separating memory into distinct areas for instructions and data. This allows for simultaneous access to both instruction memory and data memory, leading to improved performance.

Startup Code for Arm

July 13, 2023

The startup code in an embedded system plays a vital role in initializing the hardware and setting up the execution environment upon system power-on or reset. It is typically written in assembly or C languages and executed before the main function. The startup code for the STM32F107 microcontroller, provided below, configures low-level hardware specific to the architecture.

What is a microcontroller?

July 11, 2023

A microcontroller, often abbreviated as MCU, is a compact computer system integrated into a single chip. It combines various components, including a central processing unit (CPU), memory, and input/output peripherals, into a small and efficient package.

The Arm Architecture

July 07, 2023

Arm is a semiconductor and software design company headquartered in Cambridge, England. It is a fabless company, which means that it does not manufacture silicon. Instead, Arm develops the architectures and licenses them to other companies. One of the advantages of Arm processors is that they are designed for low costs, minimal power consumption, and lower heat generation. These features make Arm processors highly desirable for light, portable, battery-powered devices including smartphones, laptops, tablet computers, and embedded systems.

A Beginner's Guide to Embedded Systems

July 03, 2023

Embedded systems are an integral part of various technological advancements, including smart devices, wearables, autonomous vehicles, and industrial automation. As the popularity of these systems continues to grow, many students have expressed their interest in learning embedded systems. In response to these inquiries, I have written this blog post to provide a beginner’s guide for learning embedded systems.

What Are Embedded Systems?
